title: Aachi & Ssipak
tmdbOverview: Sometime in the future, mankind has depleted all energy and fuel sources, however they have engineered a way to use human excrement as fuel. To reward production, the government hands out extremely addictive, popsicle-like "Juicybars", which in turn also act as a laxative. Aachi and Ssipak are street hoodlums who struggle to survive by trading these bars in the black market.
synopsis: Aachi & Ssipak (2006) is a action, animation and science fiction film from South Korea. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (CA rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
